'''ây-dh-n''' ('''kayadhan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whilly|whilly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whilly|whilly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-dh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kayadhan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyadhan|thiyadhan]] || [[word:jiyadhan|jiyadhan]] || [[word:shiyadhan|shiyadhan]] || [[word:kiyadhan|kiyadhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyadhan|thuthuyadhan]] || [[word:jujuyadhan|jujuyadhan]] || [[word:shushuyadhan|shushuyadhan]] || [[word:kukuyadhan|kukuyadhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyadhan|thuyadhan]] || [[word:juyadhan|juyadhan]] || [[word:shuyadhan|shuyadhan]] || [[word:kuyadhan|kuyadhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyadhan|thuyadhan]] || [[word:juyadhan|juyadhan]] || [[word:shuyadhan|shuyadhan]] || [[word:kuyadhan|kuyadhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyadhan|theyadhan]] || [[word:jeyadhan|jeyadhan]] || [[word:sheyadhan|sheyadhan]] || [[word:keyadhan|keyadhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyadhan|thothoyadhan]] || [[word:jojoyadhan|jojoyadhan]] || [[word:shoshoyadhan|shoshoyadhan]] || [[word:kokoyadhan|kokoyadhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyadhan|thoyadhan]] || [[word:joyadhan|joyadhan]] || [[word:shoyadhan|shoyadhan]] || [[word:koyadhan|koyadhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyadhan|thoyadhan]] || [[word:joyadhan|joyadhan]] || [[word:shoyadhan|shoyadhan]] || [[word:koyadhan|koyadhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyadhan|thĂŠyadhan]] || [[word:jĂŠyadhan|jĂŠyadhan]] || [[word:shĂŠyadhan|shĂŠyadhan]] || [[word:kĂŠyadhan|kĂŠyadhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayadhan|thathayadhan]] || [[word:jajayadhan|jajayadhan]] || [[word:shashayadhan|shashayadhan]] || [[word:kakayadhan|kakayadhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayadhan|thayadhan]] || [[word:jayadhan|jayadhan]] || [[word:shayadhan|shayadhan]] || [[word:kayadhan|kayadhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayadhan|thayadhan]] || [[word:jayadhan|jayadhan]] || [[word:shayadhan|shayadhan]] || [[word:kayadhan|kayadhan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayadhan|shayadhan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayadhan|goshayadhan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayadhan|gokishayadhan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayadhanĂŒ|shayadhanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayadhanknĂŒ|goshayadhanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadhanĂŒ|gokishayadhanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayadhanshĂ«|shayadhanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayadhankshĂ«|goshayadhankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayadhanshĂ«|gokishayadhanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadhanro|shayadhanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadhankro|goshayadhankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadhanro|gokishayadhanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadhanmu|shayadhanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadhankmu|goshayadhankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadhanmu|gokishayadhanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayadhansher|shayadhansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayadhanksher|goshayadhanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayadhansher|gokishayadhansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayadhang|shayadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayadhankng|goshayadhankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayadhang|gokishayadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayadhanya|shayadhanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayadhankya|goshayadhankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayadhanya|gokishayadhanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayadhanyam|shayadhanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayadhankyam|goshayadhankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayadhanyam|gokishayadhanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadhanĂŒshĂ«|shayadhanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadhanknĂŒshĂ«|goshayadhanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadhanĂŒshĂ«|gokishayadhanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadhanĂŒro|shayadhanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadhanknĂŒro|goshayadhanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadhanĂŒro|gokishayadhanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadhanĂŒmu|shayadhanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadhanknĂŒmu|goshayadhanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadhanĂŒmu|gokishayadhanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadhanshĂ«nĂŒ|shayadhanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadhankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayadhankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadhanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayadhanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadhanshĂ«ro|shayadhanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadhankshĂ«ro|goshayadhankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadhanshĂ«ro|gokishayadhanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadhanshĂ«mu|shayadhanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadhankshĂ«mu|goshayadhankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadhanshĂ«mu|gokishayadhanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadhanronĂŒ|shayadhanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadhankronĂŒ|goshayadhankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadhanronĂŒ|gokishayadhanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadhanroshĂ«|shayadhanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadhankroshĂ«|goshayadhankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadhanroshĂ«|gokishayadhanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayadhanromu|shayadhanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayadhankromu|goshayadhankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayadhanromu|gokishayadhanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayadhanmunĂŒ|shayadhanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayadhankmunĂŒ|goshayadhankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayadhanmunĂŒ|gokishayadhanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayadhanmushĂ«|shayadhanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayadhankmushĂ«|goshayadhankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayadhanmushĂ«|gokishayadhanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayadhanmuro|shayadhanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayadhankmuro|goshayadhankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayadhanmuro|gokishayadhanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
